wisdom and what monks is the power of faith consider monks the aryan disciple who has faith he believes thus of the tata gathers awakening or enlightenment of the truth he is the exalted one arahan fully enlightened repeat with knowledge and practice well gone one world no incomparable tamer of tameable men teacher of devas and men buddha exalted one this monks is called the power of a and what is the power of diligence or energy consider the aran disciple who abides stirred in energy to be rid of unwholesome states to take to wholesome states he steadfast firm in advance nor lays aside the burden of wholesome states this is called the power of diligence and what is the power of conscience or conscientiousness consider the aryan disciple who is scrupulous he feels conscientious cruple when acting wrongly indeed word and thought on entering into evil and unrighteous ways this month is called the power of conscience or conscientiousness and what is the power of remorse or compunction herein the aryan disciple is remorseful he feels remorseful for having acted wrongly indeed word and thought having of having fallen into evil and right unrighteous ways this monks is called the power of remorse or compunction and what is the power of mindfulness consider the aryan disciple who is mindful possessing a mastery of mindfulness in high degree he remembers and calls to mind things done and said long ago this month is called the power of mindfulness and what is the power concentration considered the aaron disciple who aloo from sense desires enters and abides in the first jhana the second third fourth jana this mountains is called the power of concentration and what's the power of wisdom consider the aryan disciple who is wise he is wise as to the nature of arising and ceasing possessing aryan penetration of the way to the utter destruction of dukkha this month is called the power of wisdom verily amongst these are the seven powers that's the end of the sutta
